name: Love and Twisted
original_name: ស្នេហ៍ប៉ាស្នេហ៍កូន
overview: Vireak and his father had a big argument on their birthday. Vireak wished for his father to no longer be on this earth. The next day, they suddenly switched souls, and both of them had to keep this secret from everyone.

trailers.title: រឿង « ស្នេហ៍ប៉ា ស្នេហ៍កូន - Love and Twisted » | Exclusive Movie | Sastra Film App
